underlying_goal: Resume project work, implement v1.20 roadmap amendments, complete Phase 55.1 (upstream bug patches), release v1.19.1, and prepare for Phase 55.2
friction_detail: Claude initially looked at upstream tags instead of fork tags for release versioning, used 'git push --tags' which pushed 178 upstream tags requiring cleanup, and failed to auto-update STATE.md after worktree merge requiring user prompt.
brief_summary: User resumed GSDR project work to implement v1.20 amendments, complete Phase 55.1 bug patches, and ship v1.19.1 release; all goals achieved despite tag-pushing mishap and stale STATE.md requiring user-prompted cleanup.
